tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall policy
delete 100
edit 6
set name "EGRESS_ALLOW_UBUNTU_REQUIRED"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "LAN_NET" "PUBLIC_DNS_1" "PUBLIC_DNS_2"
set schedule "always"
set service "DNS" "HTTP" "HTTPS" "PING"
set logtraffic all
next
edit 7
set name "EGRESS_DENY_UBUNTU_ALL"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action deny
set srcaddr "UBUNTU_HOST"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "ALL"
set logtraffic all
next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
